recommendations.title: Stabilize executable path and fallback behavior
recommendations.problem: Some inputs only reached PARTIAL due to execution gaps or weak boundary handling
recommendations.root_cause: Example commands are not fully runnable or missing deterministic fallback
recommendations.fix: Add validated runnable commands and a strict fallback template for missing parameters and execution errors
